title: mangifera zeylanica
intro: Mangifera zeylanica, also known as the Ceylon mango or mango tree, is a species of evergreen tree native to the Indian subcontinent and Southeast Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Mangifera zeylanica include reducing fever, alleviating digestive issues, and treating respiratory problems, such as bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of Mangifera zeylanica include decoctions, infusions, and extracts, which are often used in Ayurvedic and Unani medicine to promote overall well-being.
